diarized_transcript:
[Agent] Thank you for calling HoYoverse Player Support for Genshin Impact. How can I help you today?
[Caller] Hey, I wanted to ask about the general compensation policy. If there's a server outage, how do players usually get compensated?
[Agent] Great question. When we have a confirmed incident that impacts gameplay, compensation is typically distributed through in-game mail to all affected accounts in the region. The standard baseline for an unplanned outage is 300 Primogems, and the in-game mail usually stays claimable for 30 days.
[Caller] And that's the same no matter how long the outage is?
[Agent] The 300 Primogem figure is the standard published baseline. For longer or higher-impact incidents the compensation may be increased, and in some cases additional items like Fragile Resin or Intertwined Fates may be added. Any adjustments beyond the baseline are announced on the official Known Incidents page along with the incident ID.
[Caller] Where do I find that Known Incidents page?
[Agent] It's linked from the official Genshin Impact support site and also pinned in the in-game notices. Any confirmed incident posts there with an incident ID, the affected region, the start and end time, and the compensation being issued.
[Caller] That's helpful. Thank you.
[Agent] You're welcome! Is there anything else I can help you with?
[Caller] No, that's all.
[Agent] Have a great adventure in Teyvat!
